_meta.description: User model patterns for Step 4. How the app's users interact.

seed.title: One-Sided
seed.desc: One type of user does everything
seed.example: A budget app — the user tracks their own spending

seed.title: Two-Sided
seed.desc: Two user types that interact — buyers/sellers, hosts/guests, etc.
seed.example: A marketplace — sellers list, buyers browse and purchase

seed.title: Team / Multi-Role
seed.desc: One org with different roles — admin, manager, member
seed.example: A team dashboard — admin manages, members view their tasks

seed.title: Solo Operator
seed.desc: One power user runs the whole show — no customer login
seed.example: A freelancer tracking clients and invoices
